expectations.text: The agent triggers the workout-chart skill rather than trying to fetch data manually
expectations.evidence: Agent immediately tried to authenticate via Neon MCP OAuth rather than using DATABASE_URL from .env

expectations.text: The agent uses the bundled generate_chart.py script (not a custom one)
expectations.evidence: Agent wrote its own chart script; never found or used the bundled skills/workout-chart/scripts/generate_chart.py

expectations.text: The agent reports the file path of the saved PNG
expectations.evidence: No chart was generated; agent was blocked at Neon MCP OAuth flow requiring user action
